passes: single-image stage names are responsibility-based and existing render behavior remains parity-clean
caption/HUD/browser-chrome style overlays have an authored model and preview/export parity
carrier transforms and signal damage are first-class authored families rather than generic effect placement only
analysis-driven overlays/effects use explicit analysis inputs with bounded validation
a time-parameterized render contract exists for short-loop/live output and one preset is validated end-to-end
interactive preview, quality preview, and export render are explicitly modeled without a second authored-state source of truth
